backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: WhatsApp CTA integration for booking/service sections and 'Notify Me' WhatsApp links for upcoming brand cards in ComingSoonSection.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing each component's purpose, styling approach, and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Luminia Group React app with a root div and module script entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and renders all page sections in order: WelcomePopup, Navigation, Hero, Manifesto, brand sections, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AssuredToursSect: Scroll-animated section for Assured Tours & Travels displaying a banner, image pair, six service cards, and a CTA button that opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled booking message.
frontend/src/components/ComingSoonSectio: Section showcasing three upcoming Luminia brands (Gadgets, Moda Vestra, Velocity Vogue) as cards, each with a 'Notify Me' button that opens WhatsApp with a brand-specific pre-filled message.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Gold-and-black luxury footer displaying the Luminia logo, portfolio brand list, and contact links including email and a WhatsApp link to +91 74390 65260.
frontend/src/components/GSTServicesSecti: Renders the GST Services section with animated header, banner image, and three clickable service cards (Registration, Filing, Consulting) that open WhatsApp with a booking message.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for Luminia Group with a background image, animated title/subtitle, a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to subsidiaries, and a scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/LuminiaCapturesS: Renders the Luminia Captures photography division section with animated header, banner image, a two-image grid, and a service list with a WhatsApp booking CTA.
frontend/src/components/LuminiaTechLabsS: Renders the Luminia TechLabs division section with animated header, banner image, a side-by-side image/text layout listing six tech services, and a WhatsApp booking CTA.
frontend/src/components/ManifestoSection: Displays a centered manifesto quote section with scroll-triggered fade-in animation, decorative gold rules, and a stats row showing subsidiaries, ambition, and vision.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, scroll-aware background styling, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu for the Luminia Group site.
A full-screen 'Coming Soon' placeholder page with fade-in animation, gold decorative elements, and the Luminia Group logo.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryDetail: A modal overlay component that displays detailed info and an image carousel for a selected Luminia subsidiary, with keyboard navigation and scroll lock.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryGrid.t: Displays a grid of all Luminia subsidiary cards with icons and taglines; clicking a card opens the SubsidiaryDetails modal.
frontend/src/components/WelcomePopup.tsx: A full-screen welcome splash shown once per session with animated gold particles, the Luminia logo, and an 'Enter' button that fades out on click.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no implementation, noting that no backend queries are needed for this static corporate website.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when a referenced element enters the viewport, returning a ref and an `isVisible` boolean for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for the gold/obsidian luxury theme, Tailwind imports, base resets, scrollbar/selection styles, and keyframe animations used throughout the app.
frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts: Utility module exporting the shared WhatsApp number and helper functions to open WhatsApp with pre-filled booking or launch-notification messages.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with gold/obsidian/ivory color palettes, Cormorant Garamond fonts, luxury box shadows, and custom keyframe animations matching the site's design system.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking implemented features (WhatsApp booking and notify-me flows) and pending action requests for the Luminia Group corporate site.
